subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of Abhá! In this most great cycle, wherein the Sun of Truth hath illumined both East and West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی در این کور اعظم که آفتاب حقیقت مشارق و مغاربرا روشن نموده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Manifestation of God as sun
